description: Add task statuses so users can update, view, and filter task progress.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence
userStories.description: As a product team, I want each task to store a status with a pending default so that task progress persists consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks store a status value of pending, in_progress, or done
Existing tasks default to 'pending' after migration or backfill
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add shared task status model
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared task status types and serialization rules so that backend and UI use the same status contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared task status type is available to list and update flows
Status labels map consistently to stored values
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend task status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want task status changes to save from the task list so that updates persist immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action validates pending, in_progress, and done status values
Saving a new status updates the task record and returns the persisted value
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badges on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to display the current status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display the persisted status badge for each task
Badge labels distinguish pending, in progress, and done states
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task list status control
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change task status from the task list so that I can update progress without opening a detail view.
acceptanceCriteria: Task rows expose a status control with pending, in progress, and done options
Changing the control saves the new status and refreshes the visible state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task list status filtering
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on the tasks relevant to my workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list filter offers All, Pending, In Progress, and Done options
Selecting a filter updates the visible task list to matching statuses only
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
